ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (e.g., address or landmark) */,
  "total_docks" INTEGER /* Total number of docks at the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., standard, premium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, maintenance, retired) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the bike (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "total_docks" INTEGER /* Total number of docks at the station */,
  "free_docks" INTEGER /* Number of free docks */,
  "busy_docks" INTEGER /* Number of busy docks */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate of the station (as a percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike reserved */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is reserved */,
  "reservation_time" TEXT /* Time the reservation was made */,
  "pickup_time" TEXT /* Time the bike was picked up */,
  "return_time" TEXT /* Time the bike was returned */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., pending, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician (e.g., mechanical, electrical) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station (if applicable) */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike (if applicable) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., station, bike) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., add station, update bike) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "affected_objects" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of objects affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dock_status" (
  "dock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dock */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the dock is located */,
  "dock_number" INTEGER /* Number of the dock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dock (e.g., free, busy) */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike occupying the dock (if any) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the dock status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dock_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dock_status_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebalancing_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebalancing request */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator making the request */,
  "source_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source station */,
  "destination_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination station */,
  "bike_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of bike IDs to be rebalanced */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebalancing_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebalancing_requests_source_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebalancing_requests_destination_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
